\noindent
\textbf{Product Data Scientist with an MSc in Geophysical Data Science and first-author publication in the \textit{Journal of Glaciology}. Built an agent-based Salesforce sales org simulator with a 3-step lookahead decision engine; applied OLS regression to isolate the efficacy of rep behaviors controlling for stage, outcome, and archetype. Experienced in defining success metrics, decomposing behavioral signals from longitudinal data, and translating quantitative findings into product-level decisions. Proficient in Python, machine learning frameworks, and statistical modeling.}

% =========================
\section*{Technical Skills}

\noindent
\textbf{Machine Learning \& Statistics:} Neural networks (TensorFlow/Keras), scikit-learn, ridge/OLS regression, causal inference, ANOVA, ARIMAX, STL decomposition, anomaly detection, cross-validation, uncertainty quantification, Monte Carlo simulation, TF-IDF, SHAP attribution

\noindent
\textbf{Programming \& Data:} Python (pandas, NumPy, matplotlib, statsmodels, Flask), SQL/SQLite, Jupyter, Git

\noindent
\textbf{Data Engineering:} Apache Airflow (DAG orchestration, PythonOperator, XCom, retry policy), PySpark (distributed feature engineering, MLlib), ETL pipeline design, SQLite, REST API ingestion

\noindent
\textbf{Product \& CRM:} Salesforce OAuth/SOQL (live CRM data integration), REST APIs (RapidAPI, Twilio, USAJOBS), A/B experiment design, metric definition, behavioral time series analysis

\noindent
\textbf{Infrastructure:} Raspberry Pi deployment, systemd services, Tailscale VPN, GitHub Pages

% =========================
\section*{Experience}

\noindent
\textbf{Independent Research \& Primary Caregiver} \hfill 2025--Present
\begin{itemize}
    \item Built an agent-based simulator of a Salesforce sales org with 4 rep archetypes (Closer, Nurturer, Grinder, Scattered), 9 micro-actions, and a 3-step lookahead decision engine with personality-weighted expected value; modeled cognitive biases (recency, sunk-cost, burnout); ExperimentRunner compares baseline vs. intervention scenarios and isolates rep behavior efficacy via OLS regression controlling for stage, outcome, and archetype.
    \item Published first-author research in \textit{Journal of Glaciology} (2026): trained a neural network on 216,501 observations, ran 273 leave-one-out cross-validation models, and quantified three-component uncertainty; translated findings for a non-specialist audience in a peer-reviewed publication.
    \item Designed and deployed a production data platform (Flask, SQLite, Raspberry Pi) with mobile-first UI and systemd service management; supports multi-table longitudinal data collection across 7 behavioral dimensions.
    \item Orchestrated a daily multi-source job ingestion pipeline as an Apache Airflow DAG: 5 sequential tasks (search $\rightarrow$ deduplicate $\rightarrow$ filter $\rightarrow$ persist $\rightarrow$ notify) with XCom state transfer between tasks, per-task retry policy, and push notification on completion.
    \item Built a content-based recommendation engine using TF-IDF and cosine similarity over a 165,000-item catalog; integrated a live inventory API for real-time availability and hold placement.
\end{itemize}

\vspace{0.2cm}
\noindent
\textbf{Accounts Receivable Specialist (Contract)} \hfill Randy's World-Wide \hfill Mar--Aug 2025
\begin{itemize}
    \item Reconciled hundreds to thousands of invoice and payment transactions weekly from Microsoft Great Plains ERP; identified short pays, duplicate payments, unapplied cash, and reconciliation discrepancies.
    \item Built Python automation pipelines to process and validate transaction data; designed rule-based anomaly detection to flag mismatched amounts and inconsistent remittance records.
    \item Parsed semi-structured customer remittance emails, transforming unstructured text into structured reconciliation datasets.
\end{itemize}

    \item Managed departmental accounts receivable and maintained financial records supporting reporting, compliance, and audit readiness.
\end{itemize}
